---
title: "04. 几何代数与面积演算"
subtitle: "Geometric Algebra and Area Identities"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 4
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "Why Book II is Euclid's clearest bridge between geometric decomposition and algebraic identity."
---

**Books:** Book II  
**Omega Directions:** `ring arithmetic`, `fold operator`, `spectral theory`

{{< include articles/category_04_geometric_algebra_and_area_identities.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
